---
title: "Seminars"
subtitle: "Speaker series, reading groups, and invited talks"
description: "BioMIND seminars and reading groups across BioAI, molecular ML, AI4Science, complex systems, and trustworthy AI."
---

The **BioMIND seminar series** will feature speakers working across BioAI, molecular machine learning, AI4Science, complex systems, network science, trustworthy AI, and human-centered AI.

## Upcoming Seminars

::: {.bm-callout .bm-callout-gold}
**Schedule in progress.** The seminar series schedule for the next term is being finalized. Speaker confirmations, dates, and locations will be posted here as they become available.
:::

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-2}

::: {.bm-card}
[Date — TBD]{.bm-card-link}
### BioMIND Seminar Series — Speaker To Be Announced
**Speaker · Affiliation**

*Abstract to be announced.*

**Fields:** Speaker · affiliation · date · abstract · bio · location · contact
:::

::: {.bm-card}
[Date — TBD]{.bm-card-link}
### BioMIND Seminar Series — Speaker To Be Announced
**Speaker · Affiliation**

*Abstract to be announced.*
:::

:::

## Past Seminars

See the [Past seminars](past.qmd) archive. The series will be seeded with prior talks hosted by CASL, Human-CAIR, MoML, and AI-AIR as records are confirmed.

## Reading Groups

BioMIND hosts regular reading groups for students and faculty. Topics rotate with the cluster's active research interests.

| Group | Focus | Cadence | Coordinator |
|-------|-------|---------|-------------|
| BioAI Reading Group | Foundation models, BioAI papers | Weekly *(planned)* | TBD |
| Trustworthy ML Reading Group | Interpretability, fairness, evaluation | Biweekly *(planned)* | TBD |
| Networks & Complex Systems | Recent papers in network science | Biweekly *(planned)* | TBD |
| Agentic AI Reading Group | LLM agents, scientific reasoning | Weekly *(planned)* | TBD |

## BioMIND Speaker Series

The Speaker Series is organized around the cluster's six research thrusts:

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-3}

::: {.bm-card}
### BioAI
Talks on AI for biology, foundation models, and biological discovery.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Molecular ML
Talks on geometric deep learning, generative molecular design, and property prediction.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Trustworthy & Human-Centered AI
Talks on interpretability, fairness, and human-AI interaction.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Complex Systems & Networks
Talks on network science, dynamics, and computational social science.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Agentic AI for Science
Talks on LLM agents, multi-agent systems, and human-AI scientific collaboration.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Cross-Thrust Panels
Periodic panel discussions on themes that span multiple cluster thrusts.
:::

:::

## Proposing a speaker

To propose a speaker to the BioMIND series, please contact the cluster coordinator via the [Contact](../contact.qmd) page with the proposed name, affiliation, topic area, and tentative dates.
